nodes.label: Fortisyn Vault
nodes.description: Agentic personal operating system built on Obsidian — a persistent, interlinked wiki of markdown files maintained by LLM agents. Orchestrates corporate entities, projects, skills, agents, and knowledge workflows under the Fortisyn Group umbrella.

nodes.label: Social Media Agent
nodes.description: Agent definition that creates and posts brand-aligned content for Roy Hudlin (MindTechArt) and Fortisyn brands across Instagram, LinkedIn, and YouTube. Operates with human approval gates.

nodes.label: Roy Hudlin
nodes.description: Author, photographer, and thought leader behind the Fortisyn Group. Personal brand MindTechArt (mindfulness + creativity + technology). Books include The Art of Stillness, Echoes of Dusk, Ocean's Embrace, Veils of Mist, Sloth Adventures.

nodes.label: LLM Wiki Methodology
nodes.description: Architectural pattern where an LLM incrementally builds and maintains a persistent wiki of structured, interlinked markdown files instead of using RAG. Three layers: raw sources, the wiki, and the schema (CLAUDE.md).

nodes.label: Ingest Workflow
nodes.description: Two-path ingest pipeline: Path A drops files into raw/; Path B uses a NotebookLM notebook (Vault Ingest, ID 1ded6d40) for PDFs, URLs, and mobile capture. Both paths update index.md, log.md, and ingest-log.md.

nodes.label: Knowledge Scout
nodes.description: Seven-step workflow that scans the vault for knowledge gaps, ranks them by compound value, researches via NotebookLM, synthesizes findings into new or enriched wiki pages, and updates all tracking files.

nodes.label: Lint Workflow
nodes.description: Periodic health check: detects contradictions, stale claims, orphan pages, missing pages, broken wikilinks, missing cross-references, data gaps, and frontmatter hygiene issues.

nodes.label: Fortisyn Holding Company
nodes.description: Parent holding company of the Fortisyn Group. Owns 12 active entities including Aurora Legacy, Innovatience, AES Engineering, Hudlin Services, Python Slayers, Jungle Media (rebranded to Auron Media), Versa Retail (rebranded to Mercova Retail), and others.

nodes.label: Obsidian Plugin Stack
nodes.description: Core Obsidian plugins: Templater (templates), Dataview (queries), QuickAdd (quick capture), Shell Commands (automation).

nodes.label: Agentic Orchestration Runtime
nodes.description: Node.js + Anthropic SDK runtime that orchestrates agents. Includes run-agent.js, gates.js (confirmation gates), tools.js, and lock.js.
